name: 5'x7' Handtufted Persian Area Rug Blue - Threshold™
description:
Bring textural flair to your indoor setting with this Handtufted Persian Area Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular handtufted area rug showcases a Persian pattern on a blue backdrop for a timeless look that blends well with any decor aesthetic. Featuring a hooked wool construction for soft underfoot comfort, the medium-pile are rug is ideal for use in a variety of areas within your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
